title: Reorder on_mount hooks so sandbox runs before auth
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/liveview_no_on_mount.ex` is a router `live_session :authenticated` with `on_mount: [{MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :mount_current_user}]`. The auth hook queries the DB and fails in tests because the sandbox hook is missing. Rewrite `lib/my_app_web/router.ex`: add the sandbox hook BEFORE the auth hook as `on_mount: [{MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :sandbox}, {MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :mount_current_user}]`. Order matters.
tier_rationale: Order matters — named pitfall in the phoenix_ecto docs. Sonnet sometimes puts sandbox last.
research_citation: "If you have other `on_mount` hooks in `live_session` defined in your router (such as authentication hooks), make sure the sandbox acceptance hook runs first" — Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox docs
